title: undertow's Nightmare Macuahuitl (CIT)
description: Adds a low-poly Aztec club (macuahuitl) to your game! Requires Optifine or CIT Resewn.
body:
This (small) resourcepack lets you transform your netherite and diamond weapons into a spooky Aztec macuahuitl! Either [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/) is required for the pack to function. If you use Optifine, the blade of the macuahuitl will be emissive!

Historically, a macuahuitl was a bladed wooden club used by several Mesoamerican nations. 

**To see the model in-game,**
Simply rename a netherite/diamond sword/axe to '**Nightmare Macuahuitl**' (case-insensitive).

As with most 3D models, the club looks terrible when Minecraft's strong enchantment glint is applied to it. I recommend reducing the enchantment glint or removing it entirely when playing with this pack. If you're playing in a version prior to 1.19.4, a texture pack (such as [No Enchantment Glint](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/no-enchantment-glint-5398021/)) can help.



![spinning club gif lol](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Qw0xRLEl/images/dda66899ed567be03539ea10c1cf3cbb1eb6da36.gif)

This resource pack was tested using:
 - CIT Resewn v1.1.3, for Minecraft 1.20.1
 - Optifine HD U H9, for Minecraft 1.18.2
 - Optifine HD U G5, for Minecraft 1.12.2

In theory, it should work on any recent version of Optifine or CIT Resewn.
